description: Professional certification for AI architects using FrootAI — validates competency in FAI Protocol, solution plays, and WAF-aligned AI development

lab.title: Deploy Play 01 (Enterprise RAG)
lab.description: Deploy the Enterprise RAG play with full DevKit + TuneKit in a sandbox environment
steps: Clone the frootai repo and navigate to solution-plays/01-enterprise-rag
Run az bicep build -f infra/main.bicep to validate infrastructure
Deploy with azd up --environment sandbox
Verify health endpoint returns 200
Run python evaluation/eval.py --ci-gate
Generate evaluation report: python evaluation/eval.py --report html
lab.pass_criteria: Health check 200 + all evaluation metrics above threshold

topics.topic: Primitive types (agents, instructions, skills, hooks, plugins)

lab.title: Create Custom Primitives for Play 01
lab.description: Create a custom agent, instruction, and skill that wire into Play 01 via fai-manifest.json
steps: Create a new agent: custom-analyst.agent.md with frontmatter and 200+ lines
Create a new instruction: data-quality.instructions.md with applyTo patterns
Create a new skill: analyze-data/SKILL.md with multi-step procedure
Wire all three into solution-plays/01/fai-manifest.json primitives section
Run npm run validate:primitives to verify all pass
Test the agent chain: @custom-analyst → @reviewer → @tuner
lab.pass_criteria: Validator passes 0 errors + all three primitives wired in manifest

topics.topic: Practical: create a primitive from scratch

lab.title: Design and Deploy a Custom Solution Play
lab.description: Create a new solution play from scratch with full 43-file structure, DevKit, TuneKit, evaluation, and infrastructure
steps: Design architecture for a novel use case (not from existing 100 plays)
Scaffold 43-file structure using npm run scaffold
Implement builder/reviewer/tuner agents with domain expertise
Write 4 instruction files (copilot, azure-coding, security, domain-patterns)
Create evaluation pipeline with 10+ test cases
Deploy to Azure with Bicep IaC
Run evaluation: all metrics must pass production thresholds
Document: README (200+ lines), architecture diagram, cost estimate
lab.pass_criteria: 43 files + audit-33-3.js passes + evaluation passes + deployed to Azure

topics.topic: Practical: design a play architecture for a given scenario

lab.title: Contribute to the FrootAI Ecosystem
lab.description: Make a significant open-source contribution: new play, new agent category, or new MCP tool
steps: Identify a gap in the FrootAI ecosystem (new vertical, new pattern, new tool)
Propose the contribution via GitHub issue using the appropriate template
Implement the contribution following all primitive naming conventions
Ensure npm run validate:primitives passes with 0 errors
Submit a pull request with full PR template checklist completed
Address reviewer feedback and iterate until merged
Write a blog post or tutorial about the contribution
Present at a FrootAI community meeting or hackathon

topics.topic: Explain FAI Protocol evolution and roadmap
